title: The Lazy Housemaids
content:
Two Maids killed the Rooster whose warning
    Awoke them too soon every morning:
    But small were their gains,
    For their Mistress took pains
    To rouse them herself without warning.

    Laziness Is Its Own Punishment
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "The Lazy Housemaids"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
